_README: STATIC OFFLINE snapshot of production supabase_migrations.schema_migrations (version -> name), captured by a read-only SELECT on 2026-07-23/24. This file exists so the audit CLI can classify applied/untracked state WITHOUT a live DB call: `python -m scripts.migrations.migration_version_audit --remote-snapshot scripts/migrations/remote_history_snapshot.example.json`. It is a fixture, not a live source. Production tracks migrations by NAME (the .sql filename minus extension); `version` is the MCP-assigned apply timestamp. Refresh only by re-running the documented SELECT; never wire CI to a live database.
_source: SELECT version, name FROM supabase_migrations.schema_migrations (read-only MCP SELECT)
